DISCOVERY 610, APPEARANCES: PAMELA UNDERWOOD FOR PETITIONER AND MOVING PARTY NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
